untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of Head-and-Shoulders pattern structure (right shoulder peak identification, neckline detection, zigzag threshold validation) which cannot be expressed using only point-in-time indicator comparisons. Pattern recognition requires historical price structure analysis and multi-point validation across bars, not available in allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The signal's core intent is anti-lookahead bias in pattern-based backtests. Attempted proxy using neckline (pivot/support) crossing with ATR-based confirmation, but true pattern completion validation (shoulder peaks, neckline drawing, zigzag threshold) requires structural pattern detection unavailable in this rule engine. Marked untranslatable as this requires candlestick pattern recognition beyond point indicators.
